artifacts_reviewed.visual_observation: Coherent, nonblank close-up portrait with readable face, hair, clothing, and lighting. Suitable for bounded local package smoke viability. The sample is a close-up portrait and does not prove full-body composition, exact project character identity, body-part mask readiness, or final hyperrealism quality.

Readable normal-map diagnostic with expected colored surface-orientation bands and subject silhouette. Suitable for confirming that the diagnostic output path and control-map save path are wired for the local smoke.

notes: This evidence confirms only bounded local package execution and visual smoke viability for the Normal ControlNet lane.
It must not be used as proof of gold-standard body masks, mask geometry authority, final image quality, or character/reference identity readiness.
Continue local-first package smoke progression without EC2/AWS, hard-gate reruns, Jira bookkeeping, or mask promotion.
